alkylation reagent: alkylated with 10 mM iodoacetamide at room temperature for 20 min in the dark.
alkylation concentration: alkylated with 10 mM iodoacetamide at room temperature for 20 min in the dark.
cleavage agent: Treatment of SR6-GEF1 at intermediate levels of trypsin yielded two major bands...
enrichment method: Lysates were affinity purified using Ni-NTA resin (Qiagen)...
fractionation method: Both proteins were monodisperse upon size-exclusion chromatography...
instrument: analyzed by LC–MS/MS using a Q-Exactive Plus mass spectrometer...
ionization type: an Orbitrap Exploris 480 equipped with an EasySpray nanoESI source...
reduction reagent: 1 mM DTT, 1 mM PMSF, 1× Roche cOmplete protease inhibitors EDTA free...
reduction concentration: 1 mM DTT, 1 mM PMSF, 1× Roche cOmplete protease inhibitors EDTA free...
